suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that VAL-CONTENT-006 requires minimum 2 assessment items per section. Workers interpreted 'has assessment items' as 'at least 1' when the contract requires 2. Pre-existing issue: l7-s3, l7-s5 have 0 items; l7-s4, l7-s6, l7-s7 have only 1 item each.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: lecture7-examples-stack-concepts review flagged this as non-blocking but it's a contract violation. Sections l7-s3 and l7-s5 have empty assessmentItems arrays; l7-s4, l7-s6, l7-s7 have only 1 item each.
